hero.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
hero.reason: In honor of Public Service Day, we celebrate the unsung heroes of our communities, like Paul Blart, a dedicated and hilarious mall cop.
hero.blurb: This comedy classic showcases Kevin James' signature humor, bringing laughter and joy to audiences of all ages. With its lighthearted tone and entertaining premise, Paul Blart: Mall Cop is a must-watch for anyone looking for a fun, family-friendly film.

released.title: Evan Almighty
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this comedy classic stars Steve Carell as a modern-day Noah, showcasing his signature wit and humor in a heartwarming story.
released.blurb: Evan Almighty is a hilarious and uplifting film that combines stunning visual effects with a talented cast, making it a must-see for fans of comedy and adventure. With its positive message and entertaining premise, this movie is perfect for viewers of all ages.

birthday.title: Frances
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Frances Farmer, an iconic actress and writer born on June 23, 1913. This biographical drama film showcases her life and career, highlighting her talent and dedication to her craft.
birthday.blurb: Frances is a powerful and emotional film that explores the highs and lows of Farmer's life, featuring a stunning performance by Jessica Lange. With its gripping storyline and strong cast, this movie is a must-watch for fans of drama and biography.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This infamous thriller has gained a cult following for its bizarre plot twists and over-the-top performances, making it a so-bad-it's-good classic.
awful.blurb: I Know Who Killed Me is a cringeworthy yet entertaining film that will leave you questioning the sanity of its writers and cast. With its convoluted storyline and poor acting, this movie is a must-see for fans of trash cinema and accidental humor.
